signal.product_name: AI Smart Sleep Mask with Brain Wave Optimization
signal.hook: POV: You discover your brain has been in 'low power mode' your entire life
signal.caption: The crazy part? It learns your unique brain patterns and creates a custom sleep protocol just for you.

script.0_5: This AI sleep mask literally reprogrammed my brain in 30 days. I thought I was just a naturally tired person until...
script.5_10: It uses targeted light therapy and binaural beats to optimize your sleep cycles. My deep sleep increased by 340% in week one.
script.10_15: Now I wake up at 5 AM feeling like I slept 12 hours. My focus is laser sharp, anxiety gone, skin glowing.
script.15_20: The crazy part? It learns your unique brain patterns and creates a custom sleep protocol just for you.

signal.hook: POV: You bought a mirror that roasts your form better than any personal trainer
signal.caption: Best investment I've made this year. My gym membership is officially canceled and my home workouts actually work now.

script.0_5: This AI mirror just called out my terrible squat form and I'm honestly impressed. It's like having a brutally honest trainer in my bedroom.
script.5_10: Watch this - it tracks every rep, corrects my posture in real-time, and even adjusts workouts based on my energy levels today.
script.10_15: The crazy part? It learned my weak spots in just 3 days and created a custom program. My glutes have never been more activated.
script.15_20: Best investment I've made this year. My gym membership is officially canceled and my home workouts actually work now.

signal.hook: POV: You bought a mirror that roasts your form better than any gym bro
signal.caption: My home gym just became smarter than me and I'm not even mad about it

script.0_5: This mirror literally just told me my squats look like a newborn giraffe... and I'm obsessed
script.5_10: It has AI that analyzes your form in real-time and gives you personalized corrections
script.10_15: Plus it streams live classes and tracks your progress automatically
script.15_20: My home gym just became smarter than me and I'm not even mad about it

signal.hook: This mirror told me I was depressed before I even realized it
signal.caption: Now it's like having a therapist, best friend, and life coach all in one mirror. My anxiety has never been more manageable.

script.0_5: This AI mirror analyzes your face every morning and tracks your mental health. It literally saved my mental health.
script.5_10: It reads micro-expressions, skin changes, even eye patterns to detect stress, anxiety, and mood shifts before you feel them.
script.10_15: When it sensed I was burning out, it suggested meditation, changed my lighting, and even ordered my comfort food automatically.
script.15_20: Now it's like having a therapist, best friend, and life coach all in one mirror. My anxiety has never been more manageable.
